descriptionZh: 标题明确包含 Bad Apple 和 but，并且是把 Bad Apple!! 用另一种媒介、界面、设备、算法或材料播放出来的作品；排除纯音频、合辑和其他 IP 二创。
descriptionEn: Videos whose titles explicitly contain Bad Apple and but, and which play or render Bad Apple!! through another medium, interface, device, algorithm, or material; audio-only, compilation, and other-IP fan derivatives are excluded.

labelZh: 其他 Bad Apple 相关
descriptionZh: 原版 PV、翻唱/演奏/编曲、纯音乐、字幕或歌词改编、合辑、其他动漫游戏 IP 二创，以及标题没有明确形成 Bad Apple but 结构的相关视频。
descriptionEn: Original PV uploads, covers, performances, arrangements, audio-first entries, lyric/subtitle edits, compilations, other anime or game IP derivatives, and related videos that do not clearly fit the Bad Apple but pattern.
